resources.string:
Introduction Welcome to Secure Tunnel Android Client (v0.0.3). This application allows you to tunnel your network traffic securely through an encrypted SSL/TLS interface to a remote Secure Relay server. Perfect for bypassing network blocks and protecting data transmission.
Modes of Operation Choose between two powerful routing techniques based on your security constraints:
1. Seamless VPN Mode (Android VPN API):
• Overview: Captures all system-wide TCP and UDP packets seamlessly.
• Method: Uses Android\'s native VpnService layer to establish a virtual network adapter. All internet traffic is redirected through the local SOCKS5/HTTP loopback proxy on the device.
• Setup: No extra software settings required! Just enable and confirm system permissions.
2. Localhost HTTP/SOCKS5 Proxy Mode:
• Overview: Starts a dual-protocol in-app proxy daemon bound to localhost.
• Method: Listens on 127.0.0.1 on your custom configured port.
• Setup: Manually configure your web browser, Telegram, or system Wi-Fi proxy settings to route via:
    Server: 127.0.0.1
    Port: (Your Configured Port, Default: 19088)
Secure Handshake Padding To defend against Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) and protocol profiling attacks, the tunnel pads the initial destination route handshake:
• All handshake packets are injected with random padding bytes up to 2x your configured option.
• Data payloads exceeding 1024 bytes automatically bypass padding to optimize network performance.
Certificate Insecurity Options • Insecure Mode Enabled: Useful for development with local self-signed TLS certificates (bypasses CA checks).
• Insecure Mode Disabled: Strict TLS checks. Recommended for production deployment.
